title: phlegmariurus eremorum
intro: Phlegmariurus eremorum, also known as the desert forked polypody, is a species of epiphytic fern native to Australia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Indigenous Australian medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Phlegmariurus eremorum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and alleviate symptoms of bronchitis. Traditionally, the plant is prepared for use through herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and topical applications.
